name: Sourdough Starter- B&b
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the milk, 1/4 cup warm water, and salad oil in a large bowl.
2. Bring the mixture to a boil over medium heat.
3. Allow it to cool to lukewarm temperature.
4. In a separate bowl, sprinkle yeast on 1/2 cup warm water.
5. Stir until dissolved, then add sugar and salt to the cooled milk mixture.
6. Gradually stir the liquid into the flour mixture until blended thoroughly.
7. Cover the bowl with a clean kitchen towel or plastic wrap.
8. Let it stand in a warm place for 12-18 hours to sour.
